answer_preamble: Append the following benchmark answers to the original prompt before generating RTL.

required_intents.title: Reset semantics
required_intents.question_intent: Ask whether `rst` is active-high or active-low, and whether reset is synchronous or asynchronous.

required_intents.title: Counter overflow behavior
required_intents.question_intent: Ask whether the 4-bit count wraps or saturates after reaching its maximum value.
required_intents.answer: The 4-bit `count` output saturates at `4'hF`; it must not wrap back to zero.

required_intents.title: Overflow flag behavior
required_intents.question_intent: Ask whether `overflow` is sticky or pulsed, and when it clears.
required_intents.answer: `overflow` is sticky. It asserts when `event_valid` is high while `count` is already `4'hF`, and it remains high until `clear` or reset.

required_intents.title: Clear priority
required_intents.question_intent: Ask what happens if `clear` and `event_valid` are asserted in the same cycle.
required_intents.answer: If `clear` and `event_valid` are asserted in the same cycle, `clear` wins. The module clears both `count` and `overflow` in that cycle.
